summary: Special Offer 2 feature testing complete. Backend API and frontend UI working correctly. Items with special_offer_2 appear in MR and Customer dashboard carousels. Admin Items page shows Special Offer 2 fields with correct values.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: ItemCreate, ItemUpdate, and ItemResponse models were missing special_offer_2 fields - added them to ensure proper API response
Fixed: get_item, update_item, create_item, and get_items endpoints were not returning special_offer_2 fields - updated all endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test data already seeded: Paracetamol (ITM-0001) and Amoxicillin (AMX-500) have special_offer_2 values. Vitamin D3 (ITM-0002) does NOT have special_offer_2.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Special Offer 2 feature fully implemented and tested. Backend models (ItemCreate, ItemUpdate, ItemResponse) now include special_offer_2 fields. Frontend uses data-testid attributes: special-offer-2-doctors, special-offer-2-doctors-desc, special-offer-2-medicals, special-offer-2-medicals-desc, special-offer-2-agencies, special-offer-2-agencies-desc. Offers carousel uses data-testid='offers-carousel' and cards use data-testid='offer-card-{id}'.
